title: EB has update, CC on the latest - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will NOT be displayed
scenario: Charge Chase popup card incorrectly displayed on Device Home screen after earbud firmware update via app
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and the Charge Chase (CC) is on the latest firmware version.
2. Ensure the earbuds have a pending firmware update available.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
4. Initiate the earbuds firmware update from the Home screen.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Return to the Device Home screen.
7. Observe whether the Charge Chase popup card is displayed.
expected: The earbuds firmware update completes successfully. After returning to the Device Home screen, the Charge Chase popup card is NOT displayed.
